title: Fiery Crisp Malaysian Sausage Skewers
description: A spicy and adventurous Malaysian dish featuring sausage, infused with flavorful oil, served in a bento box, this kosher friendly meal is perfect for those looking to try something new.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together infused oil, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, ginger, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced sausage to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated sausage onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until crispy and cooked through.
Serve the skewers in a bento box with your choice of sides.
Garnish with sliced green onions and serve immediately.
